end w=#l return W(T)end,function()Y=Y+(987468-987467)m[Y]=-75517-(-75518)return Y end,function(x,S)local W=F(S)local E=function(E,n,l,t,T)return w(x,{E,n,l,t;T},S,W)end return E end,function(x)m[x]=m[x]-(-9029+9030)if m[x]==253960+-253960 then m[x],u[x]=nil,nil end end return(X(-1028861+11654235,{}))(W(T))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or
